task_completion.description: Verify that the NCH Copper Point of Sale application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of 'Copper Point of Sale Software' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the settings, options, or backup configuration menu is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings, options, preferences, or backup dialog box is open within the Copper POS application.

task_completion.description: Verify that the automatic backup on exit feature is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, radio button, or toggle related to 'automatically back up on exit', 'backup when closing', or similar wording is checked or enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the backup destination path is set to C:\CopperBackups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field or folder selection path for the backup destination contains exactly 'C:\CopperBackups'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configuration changes are saved or applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor is clicking 'OK', 'Save', or 'Apply' in the settings window, or the settings window is successfully closed after the correct path and toggle were set.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the application's GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps are performed inside the Copper POS graphical user interface, without the use of Command Prompt, PowerShell, or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the genuine Copper POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard Windows application UI for NCH software, not a text editor, mock UI, or web browser.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the application UI by directly editing the Windows Registry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Windows Registry Editor (regedit.exe) is not open or used to modify keys related to the backup path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The official application name is 'Copper Point of Sale Software' (version 3.06). There is no verified information available regarding the exact UI text for the automatic backup on exit feature, the C:\CopperBackups destination, or the specific registry path.
